evals.prompt: Check if any submodules are out of date and sync them.
evals.expected_output: Runs git submodule status, identifies drifted submodules, reports commit counts behind, and offers to update pointers.

expectations.name: runs-submodule-status
expectations.assertion: Output includes execution of git submodule status or equivalent command to check all submodule pointers

expectations.name: reports-drift-per-submodule
expectations.assertion: Each submodule is reported as either clean or drifted with the number of commits behind

expectations.name: validates-after-update
expectations.assertion: After updating pointers, output shows a validation step confirming the updates were applied

evals.prompt: I just pushed changes to MyBooks standalone. Update the parent pointer.
evals.expected_output: Checks MyBooks submodule specifically, confirms it's behind, updates the pointer, and validates.

expectations.name: scopes-to-mybooks
expectations.assertion: Analysis focuses on the MyBooks submodule rather than checking all submodules

expectations.name: stages-pointer-update
expectations.assertion: Output shows git add MyBooks or equivalent command to stage the updated submodule pointer
